{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221955011236CD2A34101E4E417F"}"},"total":368},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606944534265905944","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"蛮有意思的，这里面很多恐怖片我都看过，还是第一次看恐怖片的同人小说的，人物形象比较立体，也有冲突点，让人好奇男主与富江和伽椰子之后的剧情发展，缺点就是没那么恐怖，男主纯魅魔，淡化了一部分这些经典鬼怪带来的恐怖感。","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":11,"text":"恐怖片","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E7%89%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741805011E4E417F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227606944534265905944%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227595428417667877950%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E7%89%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771132125,"group_id":"7595428417667877950","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2jyzfZIOH+4HLXhTAEWVdYS5ZClCoHATiPgw6pWg+eg","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b79c1fadf8954bc4ba1ed22cc75209a1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703969&x-signature=ac4v2F%2FSjZZdq4nwOOdM4%2BXjZMg%3D","user_id":"2770379682102696","user_name":"米文刀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2770379682102696","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595428417667877950","book_info":{"abstract":"【综合恐漫+富江贞子伽椰子】
（刚开分所以低）九峙澈只想好好活着。
　　这是一个融合了无数怪异、诅咒的世界。
　　开局带着被病娇砍到仅剩一颗头的富江搬家，转学，班上到处都是恐怖传说：咒怨、录像带、漩涡、人头气球、十字路口的占卜、SAIKO杀人软件......
　　幸好，他觉醒了模板系统，新手大礼包直接送了长生不死！处理、接触怪异，便能获得灵性，激活更多模板！
　　「净化」「不老」「魅魔」「满血」「魔眼」「灵觉」「免疫」「巨灵神」「强壮」「念力」「细胞」「回溯」......
　　许久之后，面对满满一溜的模板，九峙澈安全感爆棚。
　　只不过，当九峙澈看着名为伽椰子的同桌，剧团里叫做贞子的表演爱好者，他陷入了沉默。
　　如果她们是伽椰子、贞子，那咒怨和必死录像带是什么鬼？
       还有小贞子和小富江又是哪冒出来的？我不是萝莉控啊喂！
       伽椰子！你不许爬楼梯！钻被窝！
       ......
       许久以后
　　虽然九峙澈长生不死，但被诅咒和怪异们缠上的话，那他就只好小小苦恼一下了。
　　你说是吧，小地狱星？
　　说着，九峙澈一拳打爆了路过的地狱星。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bb613670ce924f3ce373c8a70e7bb5f9","author":"星生于夏","author_id":"","book_id":"7595428417667877950","book_name":"日恐：总被女鬼盯，可我不是魅魔","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595428493807075902","read_count":"79140","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"384407"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"173","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,开局,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e4e659310ac6548ffb2300290f1c18b3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779364501&x-signature=%2BmXu9ChSx%2FBIoFjSW7UKqr2zh%2B0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"102804109952","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"77"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221955011236CD2A34101E4E417F"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"list （刚开分所以低）九峙澈只想好好活着。
　　这是一个融合了无数怪异、诅咒的世界。
　　开局带着被病娇砍到仅剩一颗头的富江搬家，转学，班上到处都是恐怖传说：咒怨、录像带、漩涡、人头气球、十字路口的占卜、SAIKO杀人软件......

　　许久之后，面对满满一溜的模板，九峙澈安全感爆棚。

　　如果她们是伽椰子、贞子，那咒怨和必死录像带是什么鬼？
